title: Vehicle inspection checklist
text: Our 150-point inspection covers engine, brakes, tires, electronics, body condition, suspension, fluids, and emissions. Results include photos and a detailed condition report. Inspection takes approximately 90 minutes.

title: Financing and payment options
text: Financing options are available through partner banks (Access Bank, GTBank, Zenith) for qualified buyers. Minimum down payment is 30%. Terms from 12-48 months. Pre-approval available online.

title: Vehicle trade-in process
text: Trade-in evaluation is free and takes about 30 minutes. Bring your vehicle title and ID. Offers are valid for 7 days. Trade-in value can be applied as credit toward any vehicle purchase.

title: Warranty and service guarantee
text: Pre-owned vehicles include a 6-month/10,000km powertrain warranty. New vehicles carry manufacturer's warranty. Extended warranty plans available for 12-36 months. Service guarantee covers parts and labor.
